metadata.description: Reusable refactoring and modernization skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: java-modernization
plugins.description: Enterprise Java modernization: Java 8/11/17 to 21, Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, javax-to-jakarta, dependency alignment, post-migration build/test fixes, and endpoint-by-endpoint re-architecture — always preserving business logic exactly. Includes a searchable knowledge base, an endpoint slice tracer, /java-modernization and /java-endpoint commands, and java-modernizer / endpoint-tracer / behavior-guardian agents.
